description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 디지털 코드가 하나의 생태계로 융합된 미래의 비전입니다. FLORA-9은 합성 지능과 자연적 성장의 궁극적인 합성을 나타내며, 빛과 데이터로 구축된 세계에서 번성합니다.
description.en: A vision of a future where organic life and digital code merge into a single ecosystem. FLORA-9 represents the ultimate synthesis of synthetic intelligence and natural growth, flourishing in a world built from light and data.

prompt: A high-tech cinematic masterpiece of FLORA-9, a sentient botanical entity within a digital nature landscape. The scene features bioluminescent flowers with fiber-optic petals, leaves etched with glowing circuit board patterns, and emerald vines that pulse with flowing data streams. Neon pollen particles float in the air like pixels. The background is a fusion of a lush rainforest and a holographic grid, shot in 8k resolution with surreal cyber-organic lighting and depth of field.
